zh.lifeSummary: 當Emmeline de Grendon於大約1175年出生在英國德比夏爾沙德洛福時，她的父親William de Grendon11173歲，母親Ermentrude de Ferrers12歲。她於1210年之前與John FitzHerbert在英國德比夏爾諾波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1228年6月24日在英國德比夏爾伯頓 武朋 特倫特 聖 莫德文享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emmeline de Grendon于大约1175年出生在英国德比夏爾沙德洛福时，她的父亲William de Grendon11173岁，母亲Ermentrude de Ferrers12岁。她于1210年之前与John FitzHerbert在英国德比夏爾諾波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1228年6月24日在英国德比夏爾伯頓 武朋 特倫特 聖 莫德文享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grendon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Grendon (in Witheridge and in Tavistock, Devon), Grendon (Northants, Warwicks), Grendon Underwood (Bucks), Grendon Bishop, Grendon Warren (Herefs), or Grindon (Durham, Northumb, Staffs).

nameMeanings.name: Emmeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. In origin it seems to have been a derivative of   Emma  , but when it was revived in the 19th century there was some confusion with   Emily .  It was born by the suffragette  Emmeline Pankhurst  (  1858–1928 ), mother of  Christabel  and  Sylvia .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Emmeline de Grendon was born about 1175, in Shardlow, Derbyshire, England, her father, William de Grendon, was 11173 and her mother, Ermentrude de Ferrers, was 12. She married John FitzHerbert before 1210, in Norbury, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 24 June 1228, in Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 54.

fr.Burton-upon-Trent, Derbyshire, England: Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emmeline de Grendon est née environ 1175, à Shardlow, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Grendon, avait 11173 ans et sa mère, Ermentrude de Ferrers, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé John FitzHerbert avant 1210, à Norbury, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 24 juin 1228, à Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.Burton-upon-Trent, Derbyshire, England: Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Emmeline de Grendon um 1175 in Shardlow, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Grendon 11173 und ihre Mutter Ermentrude de Ferrers 12. Sie hat vor 1210 in Norbury, Derbyshire, England John FitzHerbert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 24. Juni 1228 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, England.

Lei sposato John FitzHerbert prima del 1210, nel Norbury, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 giugno 1228, nel Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emmeline de Grendonが約1175年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアシャルドロウで生まれた時，父William de Grendonは11173歳，母Ermentrude de Ferrersは12歳であった。1210年以前にイギリスデルブイシュアイアノーブリーでJohn FitzHerbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1228年6月24日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアブルトン ウプオン トレント スト モドウンで54歳で死去した。

ko.Burton-upon-Trent, Derbyshire, England: 영국 더비실르 버턴 업 트렌트 스트 모드웬
ko.lifeSummary: Emmeline de Grendon(이)가 대략 1175년 영국 더비실르 샤르들로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Grendon(은)는 11173세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermentrude de Ferrers(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1210년 이전 영국 더비실르 노르버이에서 John FitzHerbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1228년 6월 24일 영국 더비실르 버턴 업 트렌트 스트 모드웬에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Burton-upon-Trent, Derbyshire, England: Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emmeline de Grendon nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Shardlow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Grendon, tinha 11173 anos e sua mãe, Ermentrude de Ferrers, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com John FitzHerbert antes 1210, em Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 24 de junho de 1228, em Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos.

ru.Burton-upon-Trent, Derbyshire, England: буртон упон трент ст модвен, дирбишир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emmeline de Grendon родилась около 1175 г. в местности шардлоу, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Grendon было 11173 года, а матери, которую звали Ermentrude de Ferrers, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John FitzHerbert перед 1210 г. в местности норбури, дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 24 июня 1228 г. в местности буртон упон трент ст модвен, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

Se casó con John FitzHerbert antes de 1210, en Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de junio de 1228, en Burton upon Trent St Modwen, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años.
